results.title: PayByPhone promotes commercial leader
results.description: Mobile parking payments provider PayByPhone has promoted Nina van der Kroef to UK head of PayByPhone Business, supporting the growth of its business-to-business offering. Nina steps into the role from corporate sales executive, where she played a key role in expanding the company’s business-to-business sales activity and building client relationships across... Read more

results.title: NCC Restates Commitment To Continued Collaboration With NIPR
